original_text: Amazon demonstrated solid revenue momentum in Q2 2025, posting $167.7B in top-line revenue, representing 7.73% year-over-year growth. This acceleration from Q1's $155.7B base reflects continued strength across the company's diversified business model. The sequential quarter-over-quarter improvement suggests healthy demand trends heading into the second half of the year.
revised_text: Amazon demonstrated solid revenue momentum in Q2 2025, posting $167.7B in top-line revenue, representing 7.73% year-over-year growth. This represents a sequential improvement from Q1's $155.7B base.
changes_summary: Removed three unsupported claims: (1) deleted reference to 'diversified business model strength' as no segment-level data exists in evidence, (2) removed forward-looking statement about 'healthy demand trends heading into the second half of the year' as this is speculation not supported by historical revenue data, (3) replaced 'acceleration' with 'sequential improvement' to accurately describe quarter-over-quarter revenue increase without implying YoY growth rate acceleration (Q1 YoY growth is N/A per K001). All remaining factual claims are supported by cited evidence.
